headline: STERIS PLC (NYSE:STE): A Quality Investing Standout
summary: STERIS PLC (STE) meets quality investing criteria with 25.28% ROIC, strong revenue growth, low debt, and exceptional cash conversion, making it a compelling long-term compounder.
